# thoth_tenant_settings (Data Source)

Reads current tenant-wide Thoth settings.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `compliance_profile` (String) Current compliance profile.
- `settings_json` (String) Full settings payload as JSON.
- `tenant_id` (String) Tenant ID from provider configuration.
- `tool_risk_overrides` (Map of String) Tool risk tier overrides.
- `updated_at` (String) Last settings update timestamp.
- `webhook_enabled` (Boolean) Whether webhook delivery is enabled.
- `webhook_url` (String) Configured webhook URL.
